top_findings.summary: The skill requests unrestricted file system access tools (Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash) that go beyond the stated purpose of PandaDoc API integration for document automation. A document automation tool primarily interacting with a cloud service should not require broad local file system manipulation capabilities like Bash execution and Glob/Grep file searches unless specifically justified for local template processing. Additionally, WebFetch could be used to exfiltrate local data without clear constraints related to the PandaDoc API.
